StateView.description: Dashboard view showing sets, statuses, milestones, and versions from STATE.json

WorktreeView.description: View showing active git worktrees from REGISTRY.json with branch and path info

KnowledgeGraph.description: Cytoscape.js graph visualization of DAG.json dependency relationships

CodebaseMap.description: Tree-sitter based codebase structure visualization for compatible languages

state_endpoints.description: Returns parsed STATE.json for a project

worktree_endpoints.description: Returns active worktrees for a project

dag_endpoints.description: Returns DAG.json parsed as nodes and edges for graph rendering

codebase_endpoints.description: Returns tree-sitter analysis of project codebase structure

read_only.description: All view endpoints are GET-only; no POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH endpoints in this set

auto_refresh.description: Views auto-refresh when file watcher detects changes to underlying data files

graph_performance.description: Knowledge graph must render smoothly for projects with up to 50 sets and 200 dependency edges

definition.scope: Four read-only dashboard views with corresponding backend API endpoints: Project State View (STATE.json), Worktree Tracking (REGISTRY.json), Knowledge Graph (Cytoscape.js + DAG.json), and Codebase Mapping (tree-sitter analysis).

tasks.description: Build state API endpoint that parses STATE.json and returns structured data
tasks.acceptance: Endpoint returns correct set statuses and milestone info

tasks.description: Build worktree API endpoint that reads REGISTRY.json
tasks.acceptance: Endpoint returns active worktrees with branch and path

tasks.description: Build DAG API endpoint that parses DAG.json into graph nodes/edges
tasks.acceptance: Endpoint returns valid Cytoscape.js-compatible graph data

tasks.description: Build codebase analysis service using tree-sitter
tasks.acceptance: Service parses Python and JavaScript codebases into structure tree

tasks.description: Build StateView and WorktreeView React components
tasks.acceptance: Views render project state and worktree data correctly
Graph renders DAG with interactive zoom/pan/select
Codebase structure renders as navigable tree

acceptance: All four views render correctly for a registered project
Views auto-refresh when underlying files change
Knowledge graph handles 50+ node projects smoothly
